title: American Airlines picks SpaceX's Starlink for in-flight Wi-Fi on more than 500 planes
summary_full: American Airlines said it will install SpaceX's Starlink for inflight Wi-Fi on more than 500 of its airplanes.
summary_public: American Airlines said it will install SpaceX's Starlink for inflight Wi-Fi on more than 500 of its airplanes.
